channel.title: GitHub Open Policy Agent Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Open Policy Agent in GitHub

item.title: Checkmarx/kics
item.description: Find security vulnerabilities, compliance issues, and infrastructure misconfigurations early in the development cycle of your infrastructure-as-code with KICS by Checkmarx.

item.title: Azure/azure-policy
item.description: Repository for Azure Resource Policy built-in definitions and samples

item.title: fugue/regula
item.description: Regula checks infrastructure as code templates (Terraform, CloudFormation) for AWS, Azure and Google Cloud security and compliance using Open Policy Agent/Rego
